programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.sub-title: Snow White And The Seven Dorks (s5, ep)
programme.desc: The gang puts together a hip-hop version of 'Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs,' and Zack and Jessie get caught in a serious situation when Lisa catches them rehearsing the final scene—the KISS!

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Kelly gets a job working at The Max but may have to tell Zack it's over between them when she falls for her boss.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Zack seeks revenge after catching Kelly with Jeff.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: When Zack falls for a college girl, he lies about his age and makes fake IDs so he, Slater and Screech can sneak into an 18-and-over dance club. While there, they see Kelly's boyfriend dancing with another girl.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Carol is asked to sing at church on Christmas, but loses her voice just days before the event. A hopeful Cindy asks a department store Santa Claus to bring Carol's voice back in time.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia enters Mike in a "Father of the Year" contest through the newspaper, but in order to mail her entry before the deadline she breaks curfew. Mike catches her but she's unable to explain, and he grounds her from the family ski trip.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Fonzie receives a Christmas gift from his father but is reluctant to accept and open it. Meanwhile, Richie and Lori Beth argue about what they've spent on each other's gifts, and Joanie is upset at Howard for getting an artificial tree.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The gang works to raise money for Frank's annual hobo Christmas dinner.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis has Mayberry worried when he buys a car.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is spotted while attempting to "collect" a cement block with John Wayne's footprints from Grauman's Chinese Theater. To avoid publicity and keep Lucy out of jail, Ricky enlists John Wayne's help in replacing the block. One mishap leads to another, and the plot thickens—as does the cement. John Wayne guest-stars.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: When Beaver and Gilbert are pretending to go for a drive in Ward's car, Beaver accidentally releases the parking brake, causing the car to roll down the driveway and into the street, backing up traffic. Wally steps in and drives the car back in the driveway and clears up the traffic mess, but he soon finds himself being issued a citation for driving without a license.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally's school is having an exchange dance and Wally and Eddie must take girls from a rival school that they chose out of a hat. Eddie asks to trade with Wally and he agrees, like a shot, after seeing the picture of Eddie's intended in a yearbook. Suspicious, Wally soon quickly discovers why Eddie wanted to trade; the girl is a few inches taller than Wally.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to head home for Christmas, and once Drysdale and Jane hear about this, they make all the arrangements, getting Granny and Elly mink coats and giving the Clampetts their first plane ride in style. After a slight mix-up, the Clampetts finally get home, surprising Pearl and Jethrine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts arrive back at their old cabin to spend the Christmas holiday with Pearl. But since the cabin will be too crowded with the Clampetts and Brewster, Pearl suggests Brewster stays with her, in an attempt to get engaged. She tries to woo Brewster by showing herself off at the theatre she works at during the premiere of 'Ben Hur.'

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.sub-title: Birds Gotta Fly, Fish Gotta Talk
programme.desc: During Christmas, the castaways get homesick and recall the day they were shipwrecked.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: Gilligan is made a deputy sheriff, and begins to take his job too seriously.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama fills in for Vint as a mall Santa.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Mama's cousin gives the Harpers a live goose for Christmas dinner, Mama relives memories of her childhood while the rest of the family is horrified at the thought of killing their new pet.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In a Christmas-themed cruise, a group of orphans and a man convicted for a crime he didn't commit are among those aboard the ship. Florence Henderson, Donna Mills and Shecky Greene guest star.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A modern-day Scrooge (businessman Ben Weaver) causes trouble on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "You might say Linda Guillory is hooked on video games. Obsessed with them as a kid, Linda played and usually beat everyone she competed against. As an adult,she found and bought all of her childhood games and then added some more, for good measure. She currently holds 2 Guiness Word Records for her voulminous vintage video game collection, and even became an engineer so she could figure out how they work. Linda's collection began with her Coleco Pacman, but she is no less passionate about Zelda and her entire set of Mattel handheld games. Linda's sister Cynthia joins us today and can attest to how competitive her sister is, while our expert, Scott, who's made a career out of video games will be forced to evaluate her entire collection, and then see if he can come up with a video game she doesn't already have so that they can possibly make a trade. Good luck with that, Scott!"

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye writes home, describing Christmas in Korea: Radar ships a jeep home, a piece at a time; Henry gives the monthly lecture on sex, with the aid of figure A and figure B; Trapper helps deliver a calf; Klinger and Frank get into a fight, but Father Mulcahy smoothes things over; Hawkeye and Trapper sabotage Margaret's tent; Hawkeye flies to the front line dressed as Santa to help a wounded soldier.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Father Mulcahy writes a pre-Christmas letter to his sister, who is a nun. He recounts his frustrations at not being more effective at the 4077th.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: It's Christmas Day and Archie is the only one not in the Christmas spirit. Mike and Gloria question him, but he refuses to reveal what's bugging him. The Jeffersons come over to wish the Bunkers a "Merry Christmas", but this does anything but cheer Archie up especially since Henry is dressed as Santa.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: The Christmas season has the Evans family in the spirit and planning a Christmas Eve party. Meanwhile, while Christmas shopping for her mother, Penny gets her wallet stolen, and later steals a necklace from a department store in a desperate attempt to try

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: When Keith's Scrooge-like boss at the taxi-cab company won't give him Christmas off, the Evans family brings their Christmas party to Keith and holds at the company. J.J. hosts the festivities and it features Michael singing, Bookman (dressed as Santa) da

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred is a Scrooge-like miser during the Christmas season and his friends try to get him to join into the Christmas spirit, but he rejects the attempts. After being accused of a being a Scrooge, Fred falls asleep and dreams up "A Christmas Carol." Now it i

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Family, Mama cleans out the attic, and Eunice finds out what happened to her childhood bunny. Then, in Counterfeit Bill, Carol tries to get rid of a fake twenty dollar bill.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Nobody Does It Like Me, a department store Santa and a toy department wrapper sing after the store has closed. Then, in The Family, Eunice's brother visits, but every time he tries to speak, they cut him off with their problems.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: "The Alan Brady Show" performs their Christmas variety show.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura wonders why Rob never wants to be alone with her.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph, Alice and Ed are in a Raccoon play, and Ralph expects to be a big star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge, a mild-mannered bank clerk learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.sub-title: I Saw The Whole Thing (s1, ep)
programme.desc: A well-known mystery author is accused of running a stop sign before hitting a motorcyclist.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While working as a hotel lifeguard in Reno, Nevada, Kimble is caught in the middle of a feud between the hotel owner Dan Polichek, and his spoiled and rambunctious teenage daughter Christine. 'Chris' believes her father drove away her mother whom committe

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Art collector Victor Laszlo and his partner, Dunson, have stolen a new fuel formula from the U.S. and killed the one scientist capable of duplicating the formula. The IMF must recover the formula from Laszlo.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A grudge leads to the accidental death of a Highway Patrol officer.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A dead man has been found in a locked room, along with a gun that could not have been the murder weapon.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A surly teenager throws acid on the back of another student and later crashes a party armed with a live hand grenade.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday lands in hot water after a thief he attempted to apprehend, and in the process shot at, turns up dead and SID can't find evidence that the man fired at Friday.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While on a quiet patrol, Reed decides to spend part of his lunch break doing business at his bank while Malloy waits in the patrol car. Unfortunately, he walks into the clutches of a pair of ruthless robbers who take him hostage.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed volunteers to write a profile on Malloy for the LAPD's magazine to honor his 10th anniversary on the force, but soon discovers he may be in over his head. Out on patrol, an apparent gas station armed robbery gets turned on its head when they question the parties after a long chase, a man goes to extreme lengths to get his neighbor's poodle to stop barking, a woman's plan to get her husband arrested backfires and a liquor store robbery suspect barricades himself inside a house's garage after a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony dive into all things rockabilly! Special guest Jeff Cole of the Rockabilly Artists Alliance joins."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver wants a new pair of expensive ice skates and asks Ward to borrow $13. Wanting to pick them out himself, he goes to the store and is conned by a salesman who sells him skates that are three sizes too big.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and a bunch of other guys are invited to spend the weekend at Scott's cottage on the lake. However, Scott doesn't mention to Wally that there will be no parent supervision.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Nine Dolls
programme.desc: Mason's fishing trip to Scotland is interrupted by seven-year-old Peggy Smith. Peggy is living at a boarding school and searching for her real parents.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Sam Chandler is found murdered, his lawyer, David O'Malley, is the prime suspect—in part because Sam was sleeping with David's wife.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil fears for his Aunt Ruda's safety after several killings occur in the hospital where she is being treated.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: An old girlfriend of John Walton buys the Drew Drop Inn where Jason works.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A drifter wants to marry a rich family's daughter

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben Cartwright doubts his fitness to run the Ponderosa when his impatience results in a logging camp accident that causes serious injury to himself and an old friend's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Ward Haskins guns down Joe Flecker, who has evidence that could be used to blackmail him. Haskins thinks the information was given to Lucas because he brought Flecker to the doctor before he died. Stirred up by Haskins behavior, Lucas goes through Flecker's things, finding a wanted poster for Haskins in the sole of Flecker's boot.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Frank Blandon, a man with only one good arm, wanders onto the ranch. Lucas gives Blandon a job to "hire him and Mark a clear conscience." General Sheridan and his patrol wander by and Lucas offers to let them stay the night at the ranch. Blandon once pulled a gun on General Sheridan; as it turns out, Blandon was a Confederate soldier who once had General Sheridan in his gun sight during the war.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Selena Hartnell joins the train after bandits attack her wagon. Later, she reveals she is a bounty hunter looking for William Barrett, a murderer on the run. It turns out that Barrett is Will Cottrell, the leader of pacifists on the train."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: At an explosive fire, a girl's horse is trapped in a burning barn. Dr. Brackett and Nurse McCall lecture a man who keeps forgetting his insulin shots. A girl calls the hospital, threatening suicide; firemen stand by while hospital workers attempt to trace the call. A hostage in a bank robbery has heart problems; the paramedics must treat him at gunpoint.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Majors Houlihan and Burns press charges against Colonel Blake to get him arrested and put Frank in charge. They also put Hawkeye and Trapper under arrest so that they can't help Henry.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Once more Hawkeye writes home to his father: the doctors operate on a soldier with a grenade shot into his body; Hawkeye and Trapper color the skin of a racist patient, who demanded the right color blood, while he is asleep; Henry gets a movie of his daughter's birthday from home; the officers hold the monthly staff meeting.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A lone sniper has the 4077th pinned down—including Radar and Henry in the shower. The poor boy thinks he's firing on McArthur's headquarters, and a chopper finally comes by and wounds him with gunfire from above, ending the siege. Hawkeye walks out to into the bush to tend to the wounded soldier.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp succumbs to the Asian flu, except for Hawkeye and Margaret, who have to do everything themselves. As the others start to recover, Hawkeye falls ill but he still manages to operate when wounded arrive.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer's singing voice surprises everyone, especially Barney.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Weaver's Department store is being robbed, presumably by shoplifters. Barney poses as a mannequin to catch a thief.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: To keep Shorty in line, Shad has built a cage. Shorty escapes but is soon captured and brought to his wedding rehearsal. The slippery Shorty, however, escapes again.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: On learning that Lisa's mother is coming for a visit, the Hooterville residents go overboard in wanting to welcome the countess. Despite Oliver's protests that she's not royalty, they forge ahead anyway with plans for a parade and marching band.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men plan to destroy a gasoline station that has just been built in camp.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan kidnaps Burkhalter's sister in order to exchange her for a captured Allied agent.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Guests William Conrad And Isabel Sanford
programme.desc: In Carol and Sis, Harvey mistakenly steals another man's wallet. Then, in TV Blackouts, the gang salutes TV shows, including "Sonny and Cher, "Jack LaLanne", "Password", "The Golddiggers", and "Maude".

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Negligent Nymph
programme.desc: Mason and Paul Drake are on a fishing trip when they spot a young woman being pursued by vicious guard dogs on an island estate. After the two men pull her from the ocean, it is discovered that in her possession is a note intended for her employer, accusing him of killing his rich uncle.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, a woman keeps dreaming about room 22, the hospital morgue.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Dana needs to find the license plate number of the car that killed his fiancée.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A prince sets his eye on Irene and her money.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is hired to uncover the past life of an amnesia victim who is a Vietnam veteran.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: The reopening of the cold case of a salesgirl reveals that a bicycle she sold may be a clue to her death.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: J.R. goes to a mountain resort to find real estate developer who's gone missing.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: An escapee from a mental hospital is the primary suspect in the violent death of a farmer.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Three con artists have been swindling businessmen from out of town by posing as a prostitute and two policemen. The detectives set a trap as Gannon pretends to be a manufacturer from Lincoln, Nebraska.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed gets stuck manning the front desk after spraining his wrist, where he must deal with a caller who claims to have planted a bomb at the station, a young man who wants to file a claim of police brutality and an elderly man who walks in with a shotgun. Meanwhile, Malloy is assigned a partner who is a first-day rookie, and they deal with three young children from Oklahoma who are abandoned by their mother, and engage in a high-speed pursuit that ends in a most unexpected way.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy's brand new car gets dinged up when he has to bail out to chase down a purse snatcher, but Sgt. MacDonald promises him his kid brother in Beverly Hills can fix it on the cheap. Out on patrol, he and Reed search for a drunk man accused of randomly shooting arrows, respond to a robbery at a deli that results in tragedy and search for a drug store robbery suspect who gets away after being shot.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "From royal rule to fictional families, Bill and Toony tackle legendary rivalries!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver has been having trouble in English and Ward persuades Wally to tutor him. Wally has Beaver look over an old exam that he once took. To Beaver's surprise, the next day his teacher gives him the exact same test, which, of course, he aces. However, Beaver is left with a guilty conscience.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally plans on going to a big dance with Evelyn Boothby and they plan on getting there cramped with six other people in Lumpy's car. When June and Ward refuse to allow that, Wally and Evelyn must find another way to get there. However, what Evelyn has in mind doesn't go over well with Wally.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Loquacious Liar
programme.desc: Lester Martin's life takes a horrible turn for the worse when a man breaks into his apartment, forces him at gun-point to drink half a bottle of Scotch and then drives him into the country.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Sam Chandler is found murdered, his lawyer, David O'Malley, is the prime suspect—in part because Sam was sleeping with David's wife.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Singer Eddie Larran returns to Sparta for a concert, but not everyone is a fan. An angry man insists that Eddie owes him money. And their dispute soon ends in violence.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Jim-Bob finds out he is not eligible to fly in the Air Corps due to bad vision

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Phoebe nurses a wounded man with amnesia back to health. But with his memory returning it could lead to even more danger for the confused man and heartache for the lonely Phoebe.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe finds a saloon girl named Lila Conrad in the back of a wagon. Trouble is, she seems to be wanted—for murder. Joe wants to get her back to Virginia City for a fair trial, but it seems that other people have different plans.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Wes Carney and his wife, Clair, want to settle down and they figure North Fork might do fine. Wes is a well known gunfighter, who has promised Clair that he would hang up his guns for good. The Carney's want to live a simple, honest life and the Feed and Grain Store, which is up for sale, seems like it might work for them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Abel Goss, the photographer who took Lucas' wedding photograph, is in North Fork doing a portrait of Mark standing in the street. When Goss sees Col. Whiteside and his sidekick, Jamison, he recognizes them as the butchers who tortured him and others while he was captive in a Civil War prison camp.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Clementine Jones is in the process of being thrown out of a town when a bank robbery occurs. She ends up joining the Hale wagon train on a wagon with one of the bank robbers using it to escape who she was in love with in the past."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A young couple is rescued from a car wreck; the boy has a spinal cord injury and Dr. Early suspects the girl is pregnant. Roy and John rescue a woman trapped at the bottom of a well and an amateur magician from a safe. A rescue at a junkyard fire turns hazardous when phosphorus materials explode.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Trapper recover from an all night party. Henry gets a barbecue, and Hawkeye puts in a request for an incubator. The Quartermaster turns him down. They locate a Major with three incubators, but he won't let them have one.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Sidney Freedman comes to the camp, and joins in the poker game at The Swamp. Radar hits a local with a jeep, although the local is famous for jumping in front of vehicles for the compensation. Hawkeye and Trapper operate on an intelligence officer against regulations, and Sidney helps talk a soldier out of his plan to kill Frank.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Margaret revaluates her life, deciding to leave Frank and ask for a transfer, which is granted. She gets drunk at her goodbye party, but is sobered up in the shower when wounded start arriving. She changes her mind when she realizes how loyal her friends are.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger pretends to be pregnant. Hawkeye and Trapper operate on General Mitchell's son, and the General gives them three days in Tokyo, and Henry keeps getting calls from Tokyo about what Hawkeye and Trapper are doing.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A grumpy Andy agrees to take a few days off and heads up to the lake to relax. Barney and Gomer are in charge, and manage to capture (and lose) an escaped convict who hides in the same woods where Andy just happens to be.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer is convinced that Andy saved his life by putting out a small fire at the filling station. He then begins to repay Andy by becoming his servant.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Shorty and Gloria get married, everyone but the two of them want the marriage annulled. Gloria decides she’d like to experience what her new life will be like, and Jed tells her that he’ll show her. When he calls the mansion to tell them to put up the cabin, Granny thinks he got married as well. But when both “couples” come home, Granny, Jethro, and Elly learn that Shorty got married, but Elverna didn’t, and Gloria got married, but Jed didn’t, making Jethro and Granny believe both couples are in a Hollywood marriage.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Everyone in Hooterville, except Oliver, is overcome with spring fever; even Sam Drucker is wearing his spring toupee. Deciding to revive the Hooterville spring festival, Lisa visits the neighbors to drum up support. Meanwhile, Oliver tries to do his planting with Eb who can't understand how to work the automatic planter.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink is to be executed when the Gestapo finds him with information Hogan planted on him to deliver to the underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to get the blueprints for and interfere with the testing of a new weapon.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Barby and Ben, a toy couple's marriage is threatened by the arrival of a G.I. doll. Then, in Rancid and Harvest, a parody of "Random Harvest", with Carol as Greer Garson, a woman who falls for a man with no memory of his past.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Moth-eaten Mink
programme.desc: Restaurateur Morey Allen, a friend of Mason and Della's, contacts Mason after his waitress, Dixie Dayton, is struck by a car while fleeing the restaurant after spotting a man stalking her.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A commercial aircraft mysteriously travels back through time.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A housewife buys a stolen mink for $400.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Gil is in love with a married singer who wants to kill her abusive husband.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix works a case involving a child's missing stamp album. It appears as though someone is more than willing to kill for it.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon is hired to be a bodyguard for the daughter of a broker and his grandchildren, but is drawn in when the broker reveals that he believes his son in law is involved in a murder.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A millionaire hires Barnaby to rescue his son from kidnappers.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Matthews pursues a recidivist thief with a tip from a young boy.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A nervy bank robber uses innocent women to help commit his crimes. Friday and Gannon are nearly sidetracked when one of the victims lies about her involvement and later proves to have a criminal record of her own.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed begin today's patrol by responding to a call of a drunken woman threatening the patrons of a bar with a handgun. Afterwards, they search for a group of four carjackers who go on a robbery spree after targeting a man with a cache of guns in his trunk, and investigate the suspicious death of a mentally disabled man.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed returns from vacation with a full-body sunburn, making for a miserable work day. Out on patrol, he and Malloy respond to a fiery traffic accident, use an informant's tip to track down a drug dealer, search for an armed robbery suspect based on a vehicle description and attempt to rescue two boys after their rowboat capsizes.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony embrace the extraordinariness of Nevada, from the glitz and glam of Vegas to alien encounters."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A party is being thrown at the dancing school where Beaver and Wally once took lessons and they're both invited. This prompts Beaver to ask one particular girl who caught his eye, Betsy Patterson, if he could escort her to the dance. However, once at the dance, he finds that Betsy has promised other boys that she would dance with them.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: During a particularly awful golf game, Ward happens to break his driver and decides it's not worth repairing it, so he just puts it in the closet. Later, Gilbert talks Beaver into hitting around some golf balls with Ward's clubs and one hit with the broken driver has Beaver thinking he broke it.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Red Riding Boots
programme.desc: Ann Farwell is miserable over the separation of her parents. Things aren't made any better when her father starts seeing Rita Conover, a scheming woman half his age. When Rita turns up dead both Ann and her mother think the other committed the crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a scrooge of a store owner is accused of murdering his partner, Matlock defends the man and makes a strange request as part of his fee.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: In this Christmas episode the officers share memories with a reporter from the Sparta Herald.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The town prepares for a Founder's Day Celebration

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Festus is mistaken for a killer.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Adam, Hoss, and Joe vie for the attention of a pretty young lady named Dolores. Hoss talks Joe into entering a bull fight, but it doesn't work out quite as planned.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Aaron Pelser's wagon train comes across a pair of young boys on a buck board heading west, so he invites them to join the train. When he finds out that one of the boys is actually a girl and the two claim to be headed to Yuma to get married, Pelser and his crowd force them to be married in North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: McCain befriends Donnel O'Mahoney, a tough kid from Brooklyn, and arranges with two men for the young man to continue his travels on their wagon. Things go wrong, however, when one of them is murdered, and the other accuses the boy.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Jenna Douglas is found by scouts for the wagon train. She appears to have been a victim of a scavenger attack and is adopted by the train. As time goes on people on the train begin to have doubts about her story and her mental state."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: John and Roy are disappointed when they are the only squad not called to a major brushfire. Dixie gets her hand caught in a vending machine. A lawyer collapses in the courtroom with an apparent heart attack. Roy and John finally make it to the brushfire and become trapped while rescuing another firefighter.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Henry returns from a week in Tokyo, announcing that he is in love with a 20-year-old girl named Nancy Sue Parker. When she arrives for the weekend, it isn't long before she starts making advances on Hawkeye.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: In this riotous episode, Hawkeye gets wrapped up in a convoluted scheme to procure a new pair of boots.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Private Baker, who is always going AWOL, is desperate for plastic surgery on his nose. Hawkeye gets an old friend, and plastic surgeon, to visit the camp, promising him a nurse called "The Barracuda." They put together an elaborate scheme to perform the operation without Frank or Margaret finding out.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A Korean family sets up camp in the middle of the compound. A Korean woman with a baby comes looking for the father, and names Radar.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee, in a flurry of cost-cutting measures, saves money on beef by buying a whole side of it. Unfortunately, this happens at the same time her freezer breaks.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy finds himself embroiled in a strange backwoods divorce ritual, ending up as the object of Charlene Darling's affections.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro comes home to tell Jed that he saw Honest John, but never caught up to him. Meanwhile, Honest John tells his wife he's turned straight, but she gets mad and threatens him. She wants him to con the wealthy Clampetts.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb's latest career choice is that of a barber. He talks Oliver into paying his tuition to MIT, a mail-order barber college. Eb's sent a dummy head and hair to practice on and receives his grades by mailing the trimmed toupees back to the school. Lisa is excited about Eb's education while Oliver is irritated by all the hidden costs he keeps being asked to pay.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to steal the picture that the Gestapo is using to blackmailing Klink.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must prevent the Germans from getting ahold of a secret device that was aboard a plane shot down near camp.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In George and Zelda, a disguised Carol and Harvey complain to the audience before the show. Then, in The Spy, a WWII bomber pilot jumps without a parachute. Finally, in The Ham Actor, a TV debut for an acting duo goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Baited Hook
programme.desc: Robert Dawson confronts Albert Tydings, his partner, about $80,000 missing from Carol Stanley's trust account. Tydings admits he embezzled the money and blackmails Dawson into keeping quiet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martians give Luther Dingle the strength of 300 men.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man ends up running to the Mexican border after trying to collect money his employer owes him.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A vulnerable man is pinned with a murder he did not commit.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix tries to protect the granddaughter of an exiled mobster. It seems as though she's being stalked by hoods who want to get to her grandfather.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: An accountant wants to teach the world a lesson about the production of a deadly nerve gas when he steals a can of the substance.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: J.R. attempts to save his reputation when he's framed for rape.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A hitchhiker implicates a man who gave him a ride.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Bill invites Joe to dinner and a football game at his home in Eagle Rock. The only problem: Gannon's neighbors keep interrupting the visit with petty and then not-so-petty problems.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: As part of a trial program to help ground based officers better understand the abilities and limitations of helicopter assistance, malloy and reed are selected to be observers on several air support division missions. This morning's missions include a sea

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and reed take flight in separate helicopters to provide assistance in the search of a light plane stolen from the los angeles airport by a distraught man. Afterwards, they search for a group of robbery suspects who flee in separate cars, then reed

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony journey back to the nifty year of 1951."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Penny learns that she will be moving away and Beaver deals with mixed feelings for the girl with whom he shares a mutual dislike. However, after a farewell party at school, Beaver and Penny openly show their true feelings for one another.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "Beaver is cast as a rabbit for a school play and June has his costume all ready, complete with floppy ears and puffy tail. On the night of the play, Beaver needs to be at the school early and gets a ride with Lumpy and Wally in full costume, however, Lumpy's car breaks down and Beaver must walk the few blocks to the school to get there in time."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Larcenous Lady
programme.desc: A mayor's political career is jeopardized when his conniving wife goes too far.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Julie becomes the target of a witness with psychological problems, leaving Matlock and Conrad to learn who is threatening her, and why.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A city councilwoman becomes dangerously obsessed with Bubba.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John has been appointed to the local draft board

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt is tracked, with bad intent, along a river gorge by a gang of villains while in custody of one of the gang and $24,000 of their money. Escaping the gang by jumping into the river, Matt is rescued by two kids on a raft.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben's plans to wed widow Katherine Saunders are jeopardized after her son is accused of murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family. The townspeople are suspicious of him, however, when they discover that he, too, is an indian.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Reformed card shark Julia Massini now runs a respectable boarding house in North Fork, but Sid Fallon is threatening to reveal her sordid past unless she lets him turn the establishment into a saloon and gambling hall.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Duke finds Flint's dying foster mother who asks Flint to check on her real son Artie who she hasn't seen in five years and has a reputation for getting into trouble with the law. Flint finds him on the right side of the law - or is he?"

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Chet starts a series of practical jokes against John, who eventually retaliates. A child is trapped in a burning tree house. A retiree pretends to be ill so he can amuse the children in the emergency department. A woman feeds her sick husband dieffenbachia sap to keep him quiet. At a trash fire, a gas station worker shows signs of a perforated ulcer.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: While there are no casualties, Hawkeye and Trapper crate up Frank while he sleeps and receive gorilla suits through the mail. Henry gets a tan and gives another sex orientation lecture. When the wounded start pouring in again, their own side shells the camp, hitting the generator, and Radar tries to get through to tell someone to stop the shelling.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The supply lines to the camp are cut. Radar, the housing officer, starts doubling people up to save fuel and Klinger is thrown out of the nurse's tent. People start burning everything to stay warm while Frank wears his heated socks. The toilet paper supply is worst hit, and then wounded start arriving.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Burns tries to slap a dishonorable discharge on a decorated soldier who admits to being a homosexual.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The arrival of a new batch of mail leaves Trapper depressed, and thinking of desertion, despite Hawkeye's efforts to dissuade him. Meanwhile, Hawkeye learns that he has successfully tricked Frank into buying stocks in a fictitious company, Pioneer Aviation.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: In their efforts to win a pony, Opie and his friends become involved in a scam that has them shilling a useless miracle salve.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney are working late at the courthouse when they get a visit from two wild women. Out of pure kindness, they drive the "fun girls" home, but don't know that Helen and Thelma Lou saw them with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: While the Clampetts are talking about Honest John and why he didn't accept the money, Shifty and his wife are talking about why Shifty gave it back. They decide to work as a team, with Flo posing as John's Spanish mom. Flo is worried that they'll spot her and realize she is not at all Spanish.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa's long-awaited vacation to New York is not what she'd hoped for. She's none too thrilled hearing about Oliver's womanizing playboy days or all the wild parties they're invited to. When Oliver's offered a job with his old law firm, he's the Douglas who's tempted by the excitement of city life.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must get a defecting field marshal to England, whom Hochstetter has followed to Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets the Germans to look for an allied agent by planting an opened parachute in camp. This gives him the opportunity to get at the briefcase that was handcuffed to a courier.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Uni-Sex Salon, a hairdressing Carol drives Tim up the wall. Then, in Boring Speech, a member of the Garden Club can't stay awake for their meeting. Finally, in Interview with Chiquita, Tim interviews Charo and meets her equally feisty mother.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Fan-dancer's Horse
programme.desc: After witnessing an automobile accident, Mason comes to represent the driver of the vehicle, an exotic dancer charged with murder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old radio returns a bitter bachelor to happier times when it starts picking up programs from the past.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A woman hears strange noises in her house while her husband is away on business.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An old college professor decides to take action when he finds out that his wife cheated on him.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When two crop-dusting pilots disappear, Mannix is hired to find them.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A political refugee gets a unwilling helping hand from Frank when he creates a change of identity to help flee the country.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A man returns from prison and learns that his partner in a ten-year-old kidnapping never gave back the abducted child.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A gunman and his female hostage unwittingly wander into a designated blasting area.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Sgt. Carl Maxwell, a frustrated fellow detective, goes AWOL; Friday and Gannon have three days to track him down before Maxwell loses his badge for good.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed barely get acquainted with their fill-in assignment at LAX when a security camera spots a car being stolen from a parking structure. While on foot-beat as Zebra-12 inside the airport, they find a surprise inside of a stolen suitcase, deal with a man who picks the pocket of a returning soldier, chase down a man buying airline tickets with stolen credit cards, escort a runaway boy back to his mother and track down a suspect who robbed a parking structure attendant.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Abe Strayhorn and his assistants from the major fraud and consumer protection division of the Los Angeles District Attorney's Office launch an investigation into a local doctor following the death of one of his patients, who was found wearing a strange belt.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony celebrate the best moms and dads from classic TV."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June runs across Beaver's old electric trains while cleaning and because he hasn't played with them in years, finds someone who will take them, with Beaver's consent. However, Beaver quickly re-discovers the fun of playing with the trains and wants to withdraw from the arrangement, even though the new owners-to-be are expecting them.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Richard has just gotten, as Beaver describes it, a "keen" new jacket and this prompts Beaver to ask his parents for one exactly like it. June and Ward are hesitant after learning the price but decide to give in. However, when Richard loses his jacket, he coerces Beaver into a plot to trick his parents.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Envious Editor
programme.desc: Slimy publishing tycoon Donald Fletcher buys controlling interest in a respectable but financially troubled publishing house. Fletcher turns things upside down by turning the publications into scandal sheets featuring photographs of scantily clad women.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Cartoonist Ron Winfield has been keeping Atlanta enthralled with his recent storyline involving a Senator's affair. But just before the woman in the affair is named in print, the strips disappear.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: One of Virgil's classmates from law school is arrested following the death of his former girlfriend, but the man insists that her death was the result of her relationship with her psychiatrist.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The family members all seem involved in the war effort

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt is tracked, with bad intent, along a river gorge by a gang of villains while in custody of one of the gang and $24,000 of their money. Escaping the gang by jumping into the river, Matt is rescued by two kids on a raft.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A man who looks similar to Joe uses his name, which eventually lands Joe in front of a firing squad.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case involving a witness killed before he could testify and a killer still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness. He asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and then use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Lord Bruce Saybrook, London millionaire, takes his brother, wife and employee out west on a hunting trip hoping to repair his relationships. They run into hostile Indians. During the ensuing battle, everyone's the true character comes out."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A man is injured when his chimney explodes. A brash young intern at Rampart thinks he knows more than the paramedics and makes a near-fatal diagnosis of a heart patient; Dr. Brackett send him on a ride-along with Squad 51. A girl gets her hand stuck in a mailbox. Johnny and Roy must rescue a heart attack victim trapped on an oil refinery tower in the midst of an explosive fire.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A classic episode in which Colonel Flagg and another secret agent from another intelligence agency come to the 4077th to keep their eyes on the camp. Hawkeye and Trapper trick them both into thinking that Burns is a traitor—one thinks he's a fascist, the other thinks he's a communist.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The MASH 4077th is visted by General Steele. He wishes to move the camp five miles down the road. Hawkeye and Henry are charged with mutiny. And Hawkeye also is charged with impersonating a reporter.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: As Hawkeye and Trapper are planning to leave for Tokyo, an unusual offer to swap POW patients between the Chinese and the 4077th comes in. Henry, after much debate, agrees to send Hawkeye, Trapper, Frank, Radar and Klinger into enemy territory. Frank almost botches the swap when he brings a squirt gun to the exchange. Fortunately, the Chinese Dr. Lin Tam has a sense of humor.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: While Henry is away in Seoul, Burns and Houlihan are in charge, and Hawkeye is the officer of the day. His refusal to release a wounded Korean soldier, wanted by US Intelligence, leads to a confrontation with Colonel Flagg.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee gets upset when Malcolm Merriweather returns to Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Barney sees Andy kissing Helen in a jewelry store, he gets the idea that they are engaged. So he starts planning an engagement party and gets the whole town involved.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale is trying to get his money back, while Jed is trying to prevent him from doing so. And Jethro is trying to come up with a way to beat the smog problem. Drysdale sends Jane over to get the money, posing as a guard. When Jed doesn't give it to him, Drysdale tells him what he's got is a drop in the bucket, and only the President could really do anything. Jed returns the money and says he plans to give all his money to the President.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The man who saved the life of Lisa's uncle moves in on the Douglases seeking repayment for his good deed. Lisa feels an obligation to help Lazlo, but Oliver is simply irritated by his constant money-grubbing. Oliver's also unfazed by Lazlo's threats to cast a Hungarian curse on him.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets Klink to open an antiques business selling "rare" cuckoo clocks, a business venture that is actually a ruse enabling the POWs to smuggle information out in the timepieces.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Is There A Traitor In The House?
programme.desc: Hogan plans to send information to London by using a German radio propaganda program.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Guests Helen Reddy And John Byner
programme.desc: In Nora Desmond, Carol plays a has-been actress, who's so sure she's dying, she plans a death scene. Then, in Rona Rumor, a Hollywood gossip columnist ruins a happy marriage by twisting their words. Finally, in TV Commercials, the gang parodies classic TV commercials, including Shaving, Dirt Around the Collar, Sludge, Improper Margarine, Left-Guard Deodorant, Minnie Made Orange Juice, and Ritalls Dry Control.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Demure Defendant
programme.desc: Nadine Marshall lives with her Uncle Martin and Captain Hugo. She comes home excited one day with the news of her engagement to John Locke. When she tells her uncle, he shows her disquieting papers about her family.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a man discovers that his business partner has the ability to control objects with his mind, the pair head to Vegas to win big.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Fitz Oldham plans to torch his home and fake his death to collect insurance money.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Seymour Johnson disguises himself before killing his wealthy aunt.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When a fellow private eye assumes room temperature, Mannix investigates his death and tries to solve the deceased's final case.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A former motorcycle officer who was disabled when a thief tried to steal the payroll from an armored car, seeks Frank's help for the purpose of exacting his revenge.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: J.R.'s old flame asks him to protect her from her desperate ex-husband.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Betty Jo and Steve swear never to remove their wedding rings, but the next day she accidentally drops hers down the drain of the kitchen sink.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe tries to get rid of the pet chimp who is gradually wrecking the Shady Rest.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro gets a date with the Drydales’ new maid, Linda, but she is only interested in the fact that he has a color television set. Instead of paying attention to Jethro, she watches a football game the first night and an ice hockey game the next. Jethro attempts trying out the games, but isn’t very successful at football and doesn’t like the hockey gear.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny tries to conjure a man for Elly May, but accidentally attracts Miss Jane's man, who is actually a hired escort Mr. Drysdale got for Elly. When the Clampetts find out, they work to get rid of him so Miss Jane can have her man back.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: Seasin’s Greetinks!, I-ski Love-ski You-ski, Be Kind To “aminals”, Lunch With A Punch
programme.desc: "Popeye and Olive Oyl go ice skating and all is well until Bluto arrives., Popeye and Olive Oyl, trying to climb a high snow-covered mountain, are thwarted at every turn by the villainous Bluto., Popeye and Olive see Bluto driving a wagon hitting his weak-looking horse because he cannot pull the wagon., Popeye uses a tale of how he defeated Bluto as a boy to convince his nephews to eat their spinach."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: Cat And The Mermouse, One Ham's Family, Snowbody Loves Me
programme.desc: "Tom drowns in a lake, and goes to the bottom. There, he finds a mermouse, and then tries to capture it and eat it. The mermouse doesn't give in so easily, though., The big bad wolf dresses up as Santa Claus to try to get a ham dinner from a family of pigs but has trouble dealing with the family’s problem child., In the cold Swiss Alps Jerry and Tom try to stay warm by finding a place indoors to light a fire."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: A Fine Feathered Frenzy, Mouse In The House, Juke Box Jamboree, The Loan Stranger, Scrambled Eggs, Flea For Two, Ozark Lark
programme.desc: "Woody offers to marry an older bird for her money, but finds her unattractive when they meet in person. She, however, finds him irresistable and he avoids her while eating as much of her food as he can., Charlie tries to exterminate a mouse in the house himself., A noisy jukebox keeps a sleepy mouse awake., A wolf in loan officer's clothing pursues Woody after he forgets to repay a loan., A mischievous satyr switches the eggs of several different nests to confuse the expectant forest animals., A country flee must rescue his bride from the playboy flea who kidnapped her., Woody restarts the feud between the Martins and the Coys after he accidentally fires a gun into the shack of the last surviving Martin family member."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: Spaced Out Bunny, Bedtime For Sniffles, Hare Force, Snow Business, Along Came Daffy, Hold The Lion, Please
programme.desc: "Marvin the Martian and Hugo, the abominable snowman, capture the earth creature Bugs Bunny. , Sniffles the mouse tries and tries to stay awake on Christmas Eve, so that he can meet Santa. , On a cold snowy night, a frozen Bugs gets taken in by a kind old lady and set by the fireplace. , Tweety and Sylvester are snowed in at their cabin and search for food. , Yosemite Sam and his brother are starving in their desolate snow-bound cabin. When Daffy shows up as a salesman he finds himself as their target for dinner., It seems the whole animal kingdom make fun of the lion as a has-been. Anxious to prove them wrong, the lion decides to try and catch Bugs. "

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Vicious Valentine
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are sent to investigate the killings of wealthy industrialists and find that all are linked back to an evil matchmaker, Emma Valentine. She sets the rich men up with her young female employees, then kills them to gain their money and power. West and Gordon manage to escape from the trap she lays, and they must prevent her next target from getting married.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Lizabeth Ann Calhoun meets the wagon train staff as they stop for supplies. She asks permission to join the train so she can avoid the advances of a young man she claims is in love with her, however his real motives may be very different."

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.sub-title: The Way To Kill A Killer
programme.desc: The only chance Mariano Montoya’s herd has to survive anthrax is the immunization that Eugene learned about at college. Montoya says that if the Barkleys want to prove that the procedure is safe, they must test it on their own prize bull.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A father disapproves of the man her daughter marries.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss meets a flamboyant, sword-brandishing drunk claiming to be none other than the notorious pirate Jean LaFitte.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend, Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber who is on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Don Francisco Maldonaldo sentences Favor and Rowdy to die for the death of his son.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: "Paladin is hired by the Deverall family to clear their son, Pierre. He has been sentenced to hang for robbery and murder. But Pierre doesn't think they will really hang a "Deverall"."

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A woman on the lam for murdering her abusive husband seeks the help of Randall, who is willing to investigate her belief that her husband is still alive and responsible for the wanted posters that have made her a lucrative target for bounty hunters.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Hoi Polloi, Some More Of Samoa, What's The Matador, Hold That Lion, Who Done It, Flying Saucer Daffy
programme.desc: "A professor bets that he can turn the Stooges into gentlemen. , The Stooges are tree surgeons who are enlisted by a rich old man to find a mate for his rare puckerless persimmon tree. The boys sail to the tropical island of Rhum-Boogie to find the tree. When they arrive they are captured by the natives and will be eaten unless Curly marries the Chief's ugly daughter. The Stooges escape with the tree and, after a confrontation with an alligator; sail off with their prize. , Joe accidentally takes a picture of a paper plate, which Moe and Larry submit to a magazine as an authentic picture of a flying saucer. Moe and Larry collect a big prize, but when the picture is proven to be phony, they're hauled off to Jail. Joe then gets a picture of a real spaceship and this time he gets the fame and fortune, while Moe and Larry wind up in a sanitarium. , The Stooges are actors traveling to perform at a fiesta in Mexico. After they accidentally switch suitcases with that of Dolores, a lovely senorita they met on trip down, they must sneak into her house to retrieve their suitcase. When they are confronted by her jealous husband he vows to kill them if he sees them again. At the fiesta where they are performing a comedy bullfight (Curly is the matador, Moe and Larry are in a bull costume) the husband bribes the attendants to let a real bull into the ring. Curly knocks the bull out with a head butt and becomes a hero. , The Stooges are gypped out of their inheritance by Icabob Slipp, a crooked lawyer. The boys follow Slipp onto a passenger train and corner him, but not before they accidentally let a lion loose on the train. , The Stooges are private detectives looking for a missing millionaire. They wander around the millionaire's spooky mansion confronting various crooks and a dangerous dame. The Stooges vanquish the crooks (Shemp uses his "trusty shovel") and find the missing man. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "An american construction engineer, building a new harbor on an isolated tropical island, unwittingly blasts a brontosaurus, a tyrannosaurus rex, and a prehistoric cave man up from the depths. The island is almost wiped out by the two monsters, but all ends well."

programme.title: House of Svengoolie
programme.desc: "A family's new home is filled with scary creatures."

programme.title: Batman
programme.sub-title: A Riddle A Day Keeps The Riddler Away
programme.desc: The Riddler kidnaps King Boris, who is in town to present a gift to Gotham. Knowing they're the king's only hope, Batman and Robin set a trap using a fake jeweled crown.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: When Dr. Smith and Will become trapped in a cave during a cosmic storm, Will soon finds himself pulled through a time warp that send him back to Earth, where he lands in a Scottish castle and meets a headless ghost.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: Scientists aboard the Seaview discover that a robot, recovered from a space capsule, has been converted into a destructive monster.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: A friendly Giant scientist tries to help the Earthlings with his teleporter, but the SID find out about his sympathies and set a trap.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: The travelers materialize in 1895 on Devil's Island, where they try to help French captain Alfred Dreyfus escape.
